nodes.text:
Symptoms include rectal bleeding, mucous discharge, reduced appetite, and intermittent bloating for 7 weeks. Patient also reports fatigue. Relevant history includes rheumatoid arthritis.


PET‑CT on 29/09/2024: FDG‑avid lesion in the low rectum, no distant uptake.
